Notice Of Motion By Defendant Simon Chan For Leave To File Cross Complaint; Declaration Of Andrew Watters; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SIMON CHAN's Motion for Leave To File Cross Complaint.

Defendant Simon Chan's motion for leave to file a cross-complaint is granted. Granting the motion is in accord with the strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Nor has plaintiff Andrew Kingsdale shown that he will suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.
